title: Setup Data Models and Mock Data
summary: Create src/data/mockData.ts with TypeScript interfaces and mock data arrays for Services, Pricing, Team members, and Testimonials in Polish.
acceptanceCriteria:
- src/data/mockData.ts exists.
- Interfaces Service, PricingItem, TeamMember, Testimonial are exported.
- Mock data arrays contain at least 3 items each and use Polish text.

title: Extract Layout Components (Navbar & Footer)
summary: Create src/components/layout directory. Extract Navbar and Footer from the monolith page.tsx into their own components. Implement mobile drawer toggle for Navbar.
acceptanceCriteria:
- src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx and Footer.tsx exist.
- Navbar contains links to page sections and a mobile menu toggle.
- Components render correctly with Tailwind classes.

title: Extract Core Sections (Hero, Services, Pricing, Testimonials)
summary: Create src/components/sections directory. Extract Hero, Services, Pricing, and Testimonials components. Wire them up to use the mock data from unit 1.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Hero, Services, Pricing, Testimonials components created.
- Components map over mock data appropriately.
- Hero contains a functional "Book Now" CTA (tel: or external link).
- Section UIs match the relaxing spa theme.

title: Implement About and Team Section
summary: Extract and enhance the About section to include salon philosophy and team member qualifications using mock data.
acceptanceCriteria:
- src/components/sections/About.tsx is created.
- Renders general about text in Polish.
- Displays a grid/list of 2-3 team members with their roles and descriptions.

title: Implement Contact Section with Form State
summary: Extract Contact section. Display business hours, address, and an interactive contact form with a mock success state.
acceptanceCriteria:
- src/components/sections/Contact.tsx created.
- Displays contact info and business hours.
- Contact form handles submission locally (e.preventDefault) and shows a success/thank you message.
- Contains a link or map placeholder for Google Maps.

title: Page Integration and Final Polish
summary: Refactor src/app/page.tsx to import and compose all extracted layout and section components. Verify mobile responsiveness, scrolling, and language.
acceptanceCriteria:
- src/app/page.tsx is a clean composition of imported components.
- Navigation links smoothly scroll to sections.
- Fully responsive on mobile, tablet, desktop without horizontal scroll.
- Passes npm run lint and npm run build.
